channel.title: Posts on Devlog
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Devlog

item.description: 인상적이었던 것 닥터프렌즈에서 육아와 관련된 상담내용을 봤다. 요즘 ‘문제행동’에 대한 영상들이 많은데, 좋은 육아에 대해서 볼 수 있어서 좋았다. 한 것 / 생각한 것 새 맥북을 사서 픽업했다.
일기를 써볼까 한다. 왠지 기록이 필요해지는 시기가 다가오는 것 같다. 세가지 정도를 써보려고 한다. 인상적이었던 것 오늘 좋았던 건 뉴진스 새 앨범 컨셉.

item.title: mentoring_00
item.description: 회사에서 멘토링 프로그램을 제공한다. 회사안에서 커리어 디벨롭을 할 수 있도록 돕는 프로그램인데, 운이 좋게도 다음 프로젝트가 시작되기 전에 비는 시간에 있게 된 Nuke dev 팀의 Principle SE와 매칭이 되었다.

[2023] c++ (1/2) https://www.coursera.org/specializations/object-oriented-programming-s12n acc. cpp eff. cpp raytracing in weekends https://raytracing.github.io/ python books c++ (2/2) stl modern cpp graphics shirley + vulkan https://www.
c++ dsa ios metal (graphics / vision) projects and research (unity) how to make money job in dev

item.title: [review] across the spiderverse
item.description: good concepts 5/5 good visual 4.5/5 direction 4/5 fan service 5/5 overall 4.5/5
I have worked for last 2 weeks in comp dev and resolved 2 tickets. I was wondering how it will feel like in here, but important point is whether I enjoy doing this, but I’m not sure yet.

item.title: 05302023 daily
item.description: mostly calm and easy day. We got Canadian citizenship test schedule on June. It feels very fast process, also time is going faster.

item.title: 05292023 daily
item.description: Where am I going? I questioned to myself this morning. I just got noticed a slight health issue (caused by laziness) and then.

item.title: Reviewing OOP
item.description: Reviewing OOP As a self-taught coder, I’ve always admired well-written codes. Actually it is hard to have a chance to see such codes at work, but it definitely exists.
